title: Fix docker-build-push.yml triggers and add lockfile choice
description: docker-build-push.yml:6-7 only triggers on src/**, Dockerfile, package.json. Add bun.lock, tsconfig*.json, docker/ to triggers. Also: in release.yml, add setup-node step before `node -p` call. Also: in release.yml, remove unused `id-token: write` permission. Decide on lockfile (keep bun.lock, remove package-lock.json from CI; or keep both — but document).
validation: Read both workflow files, confirm triggers/permissions/setup-node are correct.
